insight.headline: Checkout UI Extension Update
insight.what_changed: The useBuyerJourneyIntercept API on checkout UI extensions is deprecated starting in version 2026-07. The block_progress capability it depends on is also deprecated. Existing extensions will continue to work, but new ones should not use these APIs.
insight.developer_impact: Developers should stop using the useBuyerJourneyIntercept API and the block_progress capability in new checkout UI extensions. They should look for alternative APIs to achieve the same functionality. When updating existing extensions, they should test them thoroughly to ensure they still work as expected after the deprecation.
insight.merchant_impact: Merchants may notice changes in the behavior of checkout UI extensions, but existing extensions will continue to work until they are updated.
insight.why_it_matters: This deprecation is important because it affects how checkout UI extensions interact with the buyer's journey, and developers need to adapt to the new APIs to ensure their extensions continue to work correctly.

updates.summary: The CLI has been updated to version 4.5.1, which includes a bump to cli-hydrogen 13.0.1.
The CLI has been updated to version 4.5.0, introducing new store commands for listing and creation.

updates.title: @shopify/cli-hydrogen@13.0.1
updates.summary: Hydrogen has been updated to read disabled command metadata and preserve actionable build errors during deployment.

updates.title: @shopify/create-hydrogen@5.0.38
updates.summary: Create Hydrogen has been updated to add an explicit app alias to new projects, improving JavaScript project configuration.

updates.title: skeleton@2026.4.5
updates.summary: The Hydrogen skeleton has been updated to include an explicit app alias in new projects, aligning with Create Hydrogen changes.

updates.title: POS Extensions now supports a background extension target
updates.summary: POS Extensions now support a background extension target, allowing for event observation and background logic without UI rendering.

updates.title: Identity verification for Shopify Partners starts today
updates.summary: Identity verification for Shopify Partners has been introduced, enhancing trust within the partner ecosystem.

updates.title: App Pricing: more plans, no-charge plan testing, and negative and fractional App Events
updates.summary: App Pricing has been updated with more plans, no-charge plan testing, and support for negative and fractional App Events.

updates.title: POS UI extensions 2026-07 uses per-unit fixed-amount line item discounts
updates.summary: POS UI extensions now require per-unit fixed-amount line item discounts, starting with API version 2026-07.

updates.title: Shopify Flow: Changes to Action extensions result in fewer breaking changes
updates.summary: Shopify Flow has been updated to handle changes to Action extensions with fewer breaking changes, giving developers more control.

updates.title: Shopify Flow: Action runtime URLs now update automatically
updates.summary: Shopify Flow now automatically updates Action runtime URLs on every execution, streamlining app deployment and workflow management.
The CLI has been updated to version 4.4.0, which includes updates to Javy dependencies and GCS bundle upload validation.

recap.headline: Shopify updates Hydrogen, CLI, and App Pricing, with new POS extension targets and identity verification

themes.title: Hydrogen Updates
themes.detail: Hydrogen received updates to @shopify/cli-hydrogen, @shopify/create-hydrogen, and skeleton, including patch changes to improve command metadata and build error handling. The updates also added an explicit ~ app alias to new Hydrogen projects.

themes.title: New POS Extension Targets and App Pricing
themes.detail: POS Extensions now support a background extension target, and App Pricing has been updated to include more plans, no-charge plan testing, and negative and fractional App Events. Additionally, POS UI extensions API version 2026-07 will use per-unit fixed-amount line item discounts.

themes.title: Security and Identity Verification
themes.detail: Identity verification for Shopify Partners started this week, aiming to increase trust in the Shopify Partner ecosystem. This change is foundational to ensuring merchants have confidence when granting access to their stores.

actions.text: Update Hydrogen projects to use the latest @shopify/cli-hydrogen and @shopify/create-hydrogen versions
Review and update App Pricing plans to take advantage of new limits and features
Verify partner identity to ensure compliance with new Shopify Partner ecosystem requirements
